what_was_done: Investigated memory MCP showing uninitialized. Root cause: watchdog self-restart (os.execv) killed server during post-init CPU spikes, resetting all globals. health_check doesn't trigger lazy init so it reported not_connected. Fix: removed os.execv from watchdog — now logs-only, no restart. Confirmed DAG and memory are already well-separated (different processes, different storage, fail-open coupling).
known_issues: CRITICAL: voice-web routing — messages go to CLI instance instead of tmux pane
Docker sprint: Claude Code needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var — OAuth is interactive-only
MCP SSE reconnect skips initialize handshake — needs fresh Claude Code session
next_steps: Save watchdog removal fix to memory (MCP was down at session end)
Fix Docker sprint auth — add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to run-sprint.sh, relaunch
Verify memory server stability without watchdog restarts over multiple sessions
